title.zh: 1.6 升 V6 涡轮混合动力时代

summary.zh: 2014 年起，F1 引擎规则全面转向 1.6 升涡轮增压 V6 混合动力单元。内燃机与两台电机（MGU-K、MGU-H）及储能电池协同工作，热效率跃升至公路车难以企及的水平；梅赛德斯凭借这套动力单元的先发优势开启了长期统治。
summary.en: From 2014, F1's engine rules switched to a 1.6-litre turbocharged V6 hybrid power unit. The internal-combustion engine works with two motor-generators (MGU-K, MGU-H) and an energy store, pushing thermal efficiency beyond what road cars can reach; Mercedes' early lead launched a long spell of dominance.

heading.en: Pushing thermal efficiency to the limit

content.zh:
2014 年的规则大改，把 F1 的动力来源从 2.4 升自然吸气 V8 换成了一台 1.6 升涡轮增压 V6，并强制要求它“混合”起来。整套动力单元由六个部件组成：内燃机（ICE）、涡轮增压器、控制电子（CE）、储能电池（ES），以及两台电机——回收制动动能的 MGU-K 和回收废气热能的 MGU-H。

关键不在于排量变小，而在于能量被反复利用。车手制动时，MGU-K 把本会变成刹车热量的动能转化为电能存进电池；排气管里滚烫的废气驱动涡轮，同轴上的 MGU-H 又能把一部分热能转化为电能。每圈回收、再释放的能量被严格限额（例如正赛中可回收的动能、可释放的总电能都有上限），车队要在这些限额内决定何时“助推”、何时“充电”，以榨取最快单圈。

这套系统让 F1 发动机的热效率超过 50%，远超当时绝大多数公路车。梅赛德斯在 2014 年拿出了最为成熟的设计，开启了连续多年的厂商统治；直到 2021、2022 年红牛才凭借空气动力学与可靠性打破局面。电机的加入也让“电能管理策略”成为每场比赛转播里的高频词汇。
content.en:
The 2014 rule change replaced F1's 2.4-litre naturally aspirated V8 with a 1.6-litre turbocharged V6 that had to be a hybrid. The power unit has six elements: the internal-combustion engine, turbocharger, control electronics, energy store, and two motor-generators—the MGU-K recovering braking energy and the MGU-H recovering exhaust heat.

The point was not the smaller displacement but the repeated reuse of energy. Under braking the MGU-K turns kinetic energy into electricity; the turbo's MGU-H harvests heat from the exhaust. Strict per-lap caps govern how much can be recovered and deployed, forcing teams to choose when to boost and when to charge for the quickest lap.

The result is a power unit with thermal efficiency above 50%, far beyond contemporary road cars. Mercedes' mature 2014 design began years of dominance, broken only when Red Bull's aerodynamics and reliability prevailed in 2021–22. Electrical management became a constant theme of every race broadcast.

heading.zh: 混合动力单元的组成部件
heading.en: Anatomy of the hybrid power unit

explanation.zh: 示意图标注了混合动力单元的各部件位置，以及大致重量与工作温度。内燃机居中，两侧分布着 MGU-K、MGU-H、涡轮、储能电池（ES）与控制电子，各部件被紧紧塞进单体壳后部一个狭小的空间里。
explanation.en: The diagram locates each element of the hybrid power unit with approximate masses and operating temperatures: the ICE at the centre, flanked by the MGU-K, MGU-H, turbocharger, energy store and control electronics, all packed into the tight space behind the driver.
